title: helianthemum pilosum var. racemosum
intro: Helianthemum pilosum var. racemosum, also known as Rockrose, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Cistaceae family, characterized by its pink or white flowers and adaptability to dry, rocky environments. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Helianthemum pilosum var. racemosum include reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and alleviating digestive problems, making it a popular herbal remedy. The plant can be prepared into teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal uses, with some herbalists also using it in salves and ointments for topical applications.
